name: prey_space

s_space_precursor.effort_warning: Density is effort-confounded: candidates concentrate near hydrophones and observer routes. An explicit effort model is required before this density becomes s_space.

metrics.k_salmon: withheld: needs an assembled Chinook run-timing series (WDFW/PSC/Albion/Fraser/Bonneville) aligned with a lag scan to acoustic presence. salmon.py currently provides only a climatology fallback.
gate_requirements_unmet: held-out skill vs the recent-detection-density baseline (needs the spatial fit + effort model)
calibration: reliability diagram + PIT on the spatial field
held-out visual sightings as the independent validation set

reason: s_space precursor assembled from the CAND set (density grid + depth); k_salmon and the spatial fit are withheld pending an effort model, a prey run-timing series, and held-out visual validation. No confidence promoted.
